# passwork_vault (Data Source)

Fetches a Passwork vault by name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "passwork_vault" "prod" {
  name = "Production Secrets"
}

output "vault_id" {
  value = data.passwork_vault.prod.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Display name of the vault to look up.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Vault identifier.
- `type_id` (String) Vault type template ID.
